headline: Morgan Stanley Sustainable Signals: Companies Continue Executing Sustainability Strategies But Progress Has Slowed, According to New Survey
summary: NEW YORK, May 11, 2026--Globally, over 90% of sustainability leaders say their companies continue to execute on their sustainability strategies yet fewer believe they are meeting or exceeding expectations than in 2025, according to a new "Sustainable Signals" report by the Morgan Stanley Institute for Sustainable Investing. Nearly half (47%) now see room for improvement on progress — up more than 10 points from the 2025 and 2024 surveys. The survey polled 300 sustainability decision-makers at pr

headline: How The Omda (OB:OMDA) Investment Narrative Is Shifting As Guidance And Valuation Debates Grow
summary: Omda's fair value price target of NOK 57.0 is unchanged, providing a steady reference point while assumptions around discount rates and growth are fine tuned. Recent analyst research shows price targets moving both higher and lower as models are refreshed after Q4 results, updated revenue outlooks and shifting views on growth drivers such as GLP-1 related and multi condition programs. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative can shape the way you track Omda's equity story over...
